title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Texas Instruments India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Texas Instruments India
jsonLd.description:
Texas Instruments India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Raipur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Texas Instruments India:
Texas Instruments India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Texas Instruments India!
